headline: Why Cigna (CI) Shares Are Trading Lower Today
summary: Shares of health insurance company Cigna (NYSE:CI) fell 2.5% in the afternoon session after the company announced it will exit the Affordable Care Act (ACA) marketplace in 2027, which overshadowed a strong first-quarter earnings report.
